ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: OR( Payment_Amount__c <= 0, AND( ISNEW(), Payment_Amount__c > (Booking__r.Total_Booking_Amount__c - IF(ISBLANK(Booking__r.Total_Paid__c), 0, Booking__r.Total_Paid__c)) ), AND( NOT(ISNEW()), ISCHANGED(Payment_Amount__c), Payment_Amount__c > (Booking__r.Total_Booking_Amount__c - IF(ISBLANK(Booking__r.Total_Paid__c), 0, Booking__r.Total_Paid__c)) ) )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: Payment amount must be greater than zero and cannot exceed the remaining balance
